sections.paragraph:
Original: היכל

Transliteration: hêykâl

Phonetic: hay-kawl'

BDB Definition:

  1. palace, temple, nave, sanctuary
    1. palace
    2. temple (palace of God as king)
    3. hall, nave (of Ezekiel's temple)
    4. temple (of heavenly temple)

Origin: probably from H3201 (in the sense of capacity)

TWOT entry: 493

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
